app_description.message: Effortlessly and securely save bookmarks of your favorite websites directly on your 'New Tab' page.

home_no_groups_hint.message: No groups have been created yet. Start by creating a new group.

no_groups_for_bookmark.message: No groups are available. Please create a group before adding a bookmark.

export_to_file_dlg_content.message: Are you sure you want to export all your bookmarks to a file?

import_error.message: Failed to import data. The file format is invalid or the data is corrupted.

group_no_bookmarks_hint_details.message: Add new bookmarks using the menu in the bottom right corner.

group_title_already_used_hint.message: This group name is already in use.

hint_no_groups_subtitle.message: Click 'New Group' to create your first group.

group_deleting_dlg_content_empty_group.message: Are you sure you want to delete the group '#groupTitle#'? This action cannot be undone.

group_deleting_dlg_content_with_bookmark.message: Are you sure you want to delete the group '#groupTitle#'? It contains #count# bookmark, which will also be permanently deleted.
Are you sure you want to delete the group '#groupTitle#'? It contains #count# bookmarks, which will also be permanently deleted.
Are you sure you want to delete the group '#groupTitle#'? It contains #count# bookmarks, which will also be permanently deleted.

dropzone_welcome_message.message: Drag and drop your .onhand file here

dropzone_data_apply_question.message: Do you want to apply the data from this file?

bookmark_address_invalid_hint.message: The entered URL address is not valid.

bookmark_wo_metadata_dlg_content.message: The provided URL address does not have retrievable metadata (title, icon). Do you wish to create the bookmark anyway?

bookmark_deleting_dlg_content.message: Are you sure you want to delete this bookmark? This action cannot be undone.

popup_error_hint.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

bookmark_metadata_not_found_hint.message: Unable to retrieve a title or icon for this URL address. You can still proceed with creating the bookmark.

no_groups_subtitle.message: Start by creating your first group to organize your bookmarks.

group_no_bookmarks_subtitle.message: Add your favorite websites, articles, or tools to keep them organized.

file_uploader_invalid_file_type.message: Invalid file type. Only .onhand files are supported.

data_load_error_general.message: Failed to load your data. Default data loaded. Try importing from a file.
